name: Scientific Method
description: The systematic process scientists use to ask questions and find answers about nature.

content.overview: The scientific method is just a smart way to figure stuff out. It's not complicated—you probably already do it without thinking. {{viz:diagram-01}}
keyPoints: Predict: Make a hypothesis about the answer
Experiment: Test your hypothesis with observation or controlled test
Analyze: Look at the data and results
Conclude: What did you learn? Was your prediction right?
Being wrong is not failure—it's learning
content.whyItMatters: The scientific method is how we discover truth. It's not about opinions or guesses. It's about checking your ideas against reality. Every discovery in physics—from gravity to electricity to atoms—happened because someone used the scientific method.
